word: G4063 - περιτρέχω - peritréchō - per-ee-trekh'-o - Run through

sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιτρέχω

- Transliteration: Peritrecho

- Phonetic: per-ee-trekh'-o

- Definition:

1. to run around, run around about

- Origin: from G4012 and G5143 (including its alternate)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G5143 (including its alternate); to run around that is traverse: - run through.
